mapper.select: SELECT EMP_NO as empNo, EMP_NAME as empName, JOB as job, MGR as mgr, HIRE_DATE as hireDate, SAL as sal, COMM as comm, DEPT_NO as deptNo FROM EMP WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND EMP_NAME = #{empName}
mapper.update: UPDATE EMP SET JOB = #{job}, MGR = #{mgr}, SAL = #{sal}, COMM = #{comm}, DEPT_NO = #{deptNo} WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo}
